plot outline: "The Good Dinosaur" asks the question: What if the asteroid that forever changed life on Earth missed the planet completely and giant dinosaurs never became extinct? In this epic journey into the world of dinosaurs, an Apatosaurus named Arlo makes an unlikely human friend. While travelling through a harsh and mysterious landscape, Arlo learns the power of confronting his fears and discovers what he is truly capable of.
title: The Good Dinosaur
akas: アーロと少年 (Japan, Japanese title)
Arlo and the Boy (Japan, English title)

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Sony Pictures Releasing (WDSSPR)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
